page_content:
MOCB699 Laboratory Rotation (2-3 Credits) Laboratory experience in molecular-cell biology. Prerequisite: Permission of CMNS-Molecular & Cell Biology Program (MCB). Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Cell Biology and Molecular Genetics (Doctoral); Cell Biology and Molecular Genetics (Master's)). Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

MOCB708 Advanced Topics in Molecular and Cell Biology (1-4 Credits) Lectures, experimental courses, and other special instructions in various areas of molecular or cell biology. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
